g.text: FIG-11-03. Online Store Kubernetes Deployment View
Gateway API routes external HTTPS traffic through Gateway and HTTPRoute.
Deployment manages ReplicaSets; ReplicaSets maintain Pod replicas.
Service exposes stable access to selected Pods.
The managed database and provider systems are outside the cluster.
Physical node scheduling is outside this teaching view.
StatefulSet is not shown; use it when a workload needs stable identity or persistent state behaviour.
